shorts.title: The AI boom has plunged a small Pennsylvania town into chaos
shorts.title_distilled: AI boom has plunged a small Pennsylvania town into chaos.
shorts.description: Data centers will swallow 14 percent of Archbald, evict a trailer park, and border many residential properties. Who's to blame is a matter of fierce debate.

The event gives people a chance to get [...]

The event gives people a chance to get [...]

Students and school officials at Johnson College in Scranton got together on Saturday for the Refrigerant and Recycling Event. Students were able to recover refrigerant from old units that were [...]

shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Students in Lackawanna County spent Friday stepping into the county's past, visiting some of its most recognizable historic sites.
